title: astragalus leporinus
intro: Astragalus leporinus, also known as Lepidoptera Astragalus, is a type of plant that belongs to the legume family, specifically the genus Astragalus. This plant is commonly used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus leporinus include enhancing immune function, reducing stress and fatigue, and improving respiratory health. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as dried roots, capsules, or tea, and is often used in combination with other herbs to promote overall well-being.
